title: Tweak Information Accuracy False Service Claims rubric examples

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updating the live Information Accuracy: False Service Claims rubric to match the revised example list, including the DME wording change and the packaging wording change, then validating the score still runs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updated the live Information Accuracy: False Service Claims rubric and classifier prompt to match the revised example set. The DME example now treats CGM as not offered alongside canes, wheelchairs, CPAP supplies, and incontinence supplies. The 90-day supply example now explicitly says the agent should not say it will come in packaging strips, and the delivery examples now use the updated wording. Verified the updated score executes with a direct no-cache prediction on item 308889128 using version 682d03fa-1a14-4754-97c8-d4a9393ad37c; the item now returns No under the stricter operational-claims language.
